title: ExtractedContractClauses
description: Required-clauses contract for a legal-document clause-extraction pipeline. Every extraction must confirm presence (or deliberate absence) of the four load-bearing clauses, each with its own source text.

contract_title.description: Title of the source contract, e.g. 'Master Services Agreement'.

clauses.description: Extraction result for each required clause type.

clause.description: Extraction result for a single clause type.

present.description: Whether the clause was found in the source contract.

text.description: Verbatim or summarized clause text; empty string if not present.
